评审.preview:
DNA Paris Design Awards
All submissions are evaluated by an expert jury of design luminaries.
The jury committee is comprised of designers, editors and creatives who are devoted to true excellence in design.
The evaluation of entries is based on a range of criteria that are constantly adapted to current standards.

类别.preview:
DNA Paris Design Awards
We are a platform to showcase the best and brightest with our annual design contest and award.
Our mission: to discover and celebrate fresh and creative designs from all around the world in
Architecture, Interior, Landscape, Product, and Graphic Design.
If you believe design is about much more than making things look prettier – check the categories that fit your works the best, enter your best designs and join our community !

FAQ.preview:
DNA Paris Design Awards
Entry Process and Requirements
What are the steps for submitting an entry?

1. Online registration at http://dna.paris/submit
2. Sign up for a free membership profile
3. Once you’re a member, log in with your username and password, and you will be directed to the submissions page
4. Select category(s) and enter the details for the project
5. Fill in the required information and upload your submission
6. Proceed to payment
7. You will receive a payment confirmation email

关于.preview:
DNA Paris Design Awards
Who is behind DNA Paris?

Farmani Group, established in 1985, is the organizer of International Design Awards (IDA), Architecture MasterPrize (AMP), European Product Design Awards (EPDA), Prix de la Photographie in Paris (PX3), London International Creative Awards (LICC), International Photography Awards (IPA) and the Annual Lucie Awards for Photography, which has emerged as one of the world’s most prestigious photography awards.
